title: Cobblemon improvedmon
description: Adds variant evolutions to pokemon giving useful abilities and attacks to some pokemon with little aesthetic variation
body:
# Cobblemon Improvedmon

This Addon adds variants to some Pokemon and some evolution, to modify abilities, statistics or movement, making them more useful in combat!

Some models or animations are taken from the original mod and modified (or not)
Compatible with Cobblemon: Ride 


<details>
<summary>Fakemon</summary>
  
## Golurk Gear Guardian
When Golett learns from Klink it will evolve into Golurk Gear Guardian.
![Golurk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/66b943db9e68d0c79d7f26b0576938ffc7f73b44.gif)
- Evolution requirement: Golet with Klink as team parner.
- Abilities: Iron fist, Battle Armor.
- Hidden abilitie: Steely Spirit.
- New moves: Shift Gear,  Gear Grind, Meteor Mash, Double Iron Bash, Headlong Rush.
- New stats:
  - HP: 89
  - Attack: 124
  - Defense: 125
  - Special Attack: 55
  - Special Defense: 80
  - Speed: 55


## Sneasel Dreadful Claw
A Sneasel who never achieved a Razor Claw, his claws became frozen from repeatedly using Triple Axel.
![Sneasel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/d44c0c3e3d85719fdf488808019642936c437353.gif)
- Evolution requirement: Sneasel now learns Triple Axel at level 39, use it.
- Abilities: Tough Claws.
- Hidden abilitie: Magician.
- New stats (like Weavile)
  - HP: 70
  - Attack: 110
  - Defense: 85
  - Special Attack: 45
  - Special Defense: 85
  - Speed: 115
## Greatestbull
A Granbull that takes courage, uses its large fangs to defend its own.
![Greatestbull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/d95a87dc6cbb29b28ed352d6625645502897a7b2.gif)
- Evolution requirement: Granbull now learns Hyper Fang.
- Types: Faity / Normal.
- Abilities: Intimidate, Strong Jaw.
- Hidden abilitie: Quickfeet.
- Stats: 
  - HP: 100
  - Attack: 125
  - Defense: 90
  - Special Attack: 45
  - Special Defense: 80
  - Speed: 85
- Important moves:
  - Hyper Fang
  - Return
  - Spirit Break
  - Belly Drum
  - Extreme Speed

## Golisopod Fallen Ronin
A Golisopod who loves battle.
![Golisopod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/2ca6a093491c5cb58517a2f393ba6b05020dd0f0.gif)
- Evolution requirement: Wimpod same as Galarian Yamask.
- Abilities: Sharpness.
- Hidden abilitie: Stamina.
- New stats (like Golisopod): 
  - HP: 90
  - Attack: 120
  - Defense: 140
  - Special Attack: 40
  - Special Defense: 110
  - Speed: 25
- New moves: 
  - Aquacutter
  - Sacred Sword
  - Night Slash
  - Ceaseless Edge 
  - Scale Shot


## Highyena 
Leader of her pack, therefore she cannot be evolved by a trainer.
![Highyena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/1260340ee3c145efabf7b18da1d58dcbb8fbea5c.gif)
- Must be caught in the wild, cannot be obtained through evolution, appears rarely where Mightyena can appear.
- Types: Dark / Psychic.
- Abilities: Intimidate, Queenly Majesty.
- Hidden abilitie: Moxie.
- Stats: 
  - HP: 80
  - Attack: 125
  - Defense: 85
  - Special Attack: 45
  - Special Defense: 75
  - Speed: 117

## Sunglarer 
A traveling plant that decides where to stay planted.
![Sunglarer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/39e6ea18a464043857b6595577b6c2cb1e8d414f.gif)
- Evolution requirement: Give a Minecraft Vanilla Pot to a Sunflora
- Types: Grass / Fire.
- Abilities: Seed Sower, Harvest.
- Hidden abilitie: Drought.
- Stats: 
  - HP: 95
  - Attack: 45
  - Defense: 125
  - Special Attack: 105
  - Special Defense: 115
  - Speed: 15

## Dusknoir Tesla
It is said that its electrical power comes from powerful electromagnetic waves from the other world.
![Dusknoir Tesla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b12949128fae408230d28c1c64794fc5329eb994.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give a electirizer to a Dusclops and trade (link cable)
- Types: Ghost / Electric.
- Abilities: Lightningrod.
- Hidden abilitie: transistor.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 85
  - Attack: 55
  - Defense: 135
  - Special Attack: 105
  - Special Defense: 110
  - Speed: 35

## Electivire Raijin
It channeled its excess energy and anger into the arts of theater and dance, which it applied in combat to deliver hard hits.
![Electivire Raijin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd47b0f64dd6fab0f1316d1c509413a7ed29d958.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give a Black belt to a Electabuzz and trade (link cable)
- Types: Electric / Fight.
- Abilities: Motor Drive.
- Hidden abilitie: Electric Surge.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 75
  - Attack: 133
  - Defense: 67
  - Special Attack: 55
  - Special Defense: 85
  - Speed: 125

## Magmortar Eternal Forge
Forging assistant par excellence, capable of eating raw ores and spitting out pure metal.
![Magmortar Eternal Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70273974b2768fc1520fd277190b63f28da98433.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give a Metal Coat to a Magmar and trade (link cable)
- Types: Fire / Steel.
- Abilities: Flash Fire.
- Hidden abilitie: Earth Eater.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 91
  - Attack: 40
  - Defense: 106
  - Special Attack: 130
  - Special Defense: 106
  - Speed: 67

## Salangster
The boss. The family protects itself, don't let the family down.

![Salangster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/32588dc0a277be5eb5d456fe2735043a640bd46e.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give a King´s Rock at night to a Salandit (male)
- Types: Poison / Dark.
- Abilities: Corrosion.
- Hidden abilitie: Oblivious.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 90
  - Attack: 85
  - Defense: 125
  - Special Attack: 45
  - Special Defense: 115
  - Speed: 20

## Scolipede War Mount
The faithful mount of the leaders of ancient cavalry battles.
![Scolipede War Mount](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/43309d3f34724e011922b6c118e8dc6c0e43dcd8.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give a Metal Coat to a Wirlipede at level 36
- Types: Bug / Steel.
- Abilities: Swarm, Mirror Armor.
- Hidden abilitie: Speed Boost.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 60
  - Attack: 120
  - Defense: 134
  - Special Attack: 45
  - Special Defense: 69
  - Speed: 92

## Lanturn Kullat
The star that leads constellations in the depths of the oceans.
![Lanturn Kullat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/90665f9502a92b897d15f740841714da438b0479.png)
- Evolution requirement: Chinchou level 30 on new moon night
- Types: Water / Electric.
- Abilities: Volt Absorb, Water Absorb.
- Hidden abilitie: Regenerator.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 165
  - Attack: 40
  - Defense: 85
  - Special Attack: 75
  - Special Defense: 80
  - Speed: 45

## Ledibolt
It is said to be a Pokémon that comes from the wars that are yet to come.
![Ledibolt Canon mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/744b79369ffe92e4fb9f2fc06f44de03f098f777.png)![Ledibolt Shield mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/324e1a684f1ae1b9de1aec620e80099f1d7a9621.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give an Auspicious Armor to a Ledian and trade (link cable), according to nature, +attack or sp atk or +speed -atk = Canon mode; +defence or sp def or +speed -def= shield mode.
- Types: Bug / Electric.
- Abilities:
  - Canon mode: Competitive, No Guard.
  - Shield mode: Prankster, Overcoat.
- Hidden abilitie: 
  - Canon mode: Sheer Force.
  - Shield mode: Filter.
- Stats:  
  - HP: Canon mode 75 --- Shield mode 95
  - Attack: Canon mode 35 --- Shield mode 30
  - Defense: Canon mode 50 --- Shield mode 145
  - Sp Attack: Canon mode 145 --- Shield mode 
  - Sp Defense: Canon mode 50 --- Shield mode 
  - Speed: Canon mode 125 --- Shield mode 45

## Ariaskull
It´s said to be a Pokémon possessed by the souls of ancient warriors.
![Ariaskull](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/cde462172800c1a5779589c123d6a2374f7191ff.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give an Malicious Armor to an Ariados and trade (link cable).
- Types: Bug / Ghost.
- Abilities: Wonder Guard.
- Hidden abilitie: Wonder Guard.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 1
  - Attack: 130
  - Defense: 1
  - Sp Attack: 130
  - Sp Defense: 1 
  - Speed: 130

## Krichestra
Organize large groups of Pokémon to generate all kinds of melodies.
![Krichestra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/e67f685c16976081946005f1b44140c472d17f68.png)
- Evolution requirement: Give an Metronome (item, not move) to a Kricketune and trade (link cable).
- Types: Bug / Normal.
- Abilities: Swarm.
- Hidden abilitie: Punk Rock.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 87
  - Attack: 55
  - Defense: 63
  - Sp Attack: 125
  - Sp Defense: 54
  - Speed: 95

## Crabbuki
Despite its great size and warrior nature, it is responsible for maintaining traditions, teaching its theatrical dances to the Crabominables who have evolved in the icy places.
![Crabbuki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DHn6JjmX/images/c60d5a3ef8015fa183ce144ce659d833e78f949a.png)

Designed in collaboration with ['Ayuda a Swinub'](https://youtu.be/c-LNVq20dvA) Youtube channel

- Evolution requirement: Crabominable now learns Swords Dance at level 60, use it 20 times and go to an ice spikes biome.
- Types: Fighting / Ice.
- Abilities: Hyper Cutter, Anger Point.
- Hidden abilitie: Gorilla Tactics.
- Stats:  
  - HP: 122
  - Attack: 147
  - Defense: 107
  - Sp Attack: 40
  - Sp Defense: 87
  - Speed: 23





</details>
<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

Use on **servers is allowed** as long as authorship is respected and the **Pokémon cannot be obtained through payment methods** (subscriptions, donations, season passes, etc.)

It is **allowed to make videos** about the content as long as the authorship of the Add-On is respected.

**Distribution/reposting outside of Modrinth is not allowed.**

</details>
